_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of the nature and function of technology platforms and tools used to create and employ AI.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of agentic AI design patterns, including tool use, multi-agent coordination, memory systems, and the safety and reliability challenges specific to agentic architectures.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI AI domain. AI-K-010 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: TF-A-001 (TF, cosine: 0.582), OP-S-010 (OP, cosine: 0.580).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.3/10 (raw 0.633). Shared vocabulary: [ai, knowledge]. DCWF-only terms [create, employ, function, nature, platforms, technology] vs WIDAI-only terms [agent, agentic, architectures, challenges, coordination, design] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.893 (P=0.909, R=0.878). P exceeds R by 0.031 — the DCWF element's 17 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 23 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Knowledge of the nature and function of technology platforms and tools used to c" and "Knowledge of agentic AI design patterns, including tool use, multi-agent coordin" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.604 ≈ STS 0.633 (gap 0.029). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [ai, knowledge] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 20.0%. Shared tokens: [ai, knowledge]. DCWF-only: [create, employ, function, nature, platforms, technology]. WIDAI-only: [agent, agentic, architectures, challenges, coordination, design].
